chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 11 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.01.2018. Mr. Tarique Ali Narai, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. alongwith IO/ASI Heerchand PS Nangarparkar. = Mr. Raja Hanraj Naurang, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record. Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record, copy whereof supplied to the other side. Petitioners present in person, submit that they have married with each other under valid Nikahnama, available on record. Petitioner No.1 also states that neither she has been abducted nor enticed away by any one. She further submits that earlier she was non-muslim and her name was Kesri, thereafter she has embraced Islam at Khanqah-e-Aliya Mujaddiya Ibrahimiya, Gulzar-e-Khalil, Taluka Samaro District Umerkot and after embracing Islam she has contracted marriage with the petitioner No.2 but due to this marriage the private respondents including the father of petitioner No.1 have become annoyed and they have lodged a false FIR bearing Crime No.62/2017 at police station Nangarparkar and the local police is harassing them. She was specifically asked in court whether she wants to go with her father, she replied in negative. She further submits that she is living happy with her husband/petitioner No.2 and wants to go with him. Under these circumstances, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide all legal protection of lives and properties of the petitioners in accordance with law.

She further submits that she is living happy with her husband/petitioner No.2 and wants to go with him. Under these circumstances, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide all legal protection of lives and properties of the petitioners in accordance with law. I.O. of the case present in court is directed to record the statement of the petitioner No.1 (star witness of the incident) at her verbatim and after recording her statement a copy whereof be placed on record and another copy be filed before the concerned Magistrate for passing appropriate orders in accordance with law. Till then no arrest shall be made of the persons nominated in the aforesaid FIR. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
